properties.name: googleMaps.apiKey
properties.description: Google Maps API key used for Geocoding and Routes API calls.

properties.name: googleMaps.geocodingBaseUrl
properties.description: Base URL for Google Geocoding API.

properties.name: googleMaps.geocodeCacheTtlSeconds
properties.description: TTL in seconds for geocoding cache entries.

properties.name: googleMaps.routesBaseUrl
properties.description: Base URL for Google Routes API.

properties.name: googleMaps.routesCacheTtlSeconds
properties.description: TTL in seconds for routes cache entries.

properties.name: googleMaps.fallbackKmh
properties.description: Fallback speed in km/h used when route leg API lookup fails.
